message:
fix: correct box border alignment for emoji/symbol content

Fix spacing in all box content lines containing emojis (⚡, ✓, ✗, 👁, 🔍,
🔬, ⚠) and symbols (●, ◉) which take 2 display columns in terminals but
only 1 character position in strings. This caused misaligned closing
borders in various status and informational boxes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
